Viewed For anyone interested in the UK clinic we will be opening - things are all moving in the right direction - has taken longer than expected as is the case when opening health clinics as we want to do everything in the best, safest, and most effective way possible - and we also want the space to look great, which it definitely will.

The location - soul behind it, and space we are building for the community is going to be something incredible, will be posting an in depth video on it toward the end of November/begining of December with a first peak at the space, an in depth dive into the mission of what we are trying to achieve - along with the first community spaces we will be holding and facilitating for people struggling with physical and mental health while the clinic is being set up - its so important for me to create spaces where people do not feel alone - where they can feel seen - heard - and can make friends when dealing with loneliness from chronic illness

I believe what we can offer is something lacking in the private medical space - a space that will never be primarily motivated by profit - but motivated by the the soul purpose of giving people a reason to live. So many of you have relayed how much having a digital space where they can meet people who can relate to them has helped them over the years and we want to bring that to the real world while also simultaneously offering very practical interventions which can help manage symptoms of chronic health issues across the board - were building an incredible team - covering many different bases - want to be a resource of a wealth of cutting edge information - but most importantly - provide a community space where people don't feel dismissed, or in a conveyor belt like system, and that doesn't feel overly clinical or depressing

From years of having my own health problems i feel i've learned the things that are missing, from creating environments that dont feel sterile, to comfort, and ways to build your own support networks that you can build and take with you even after you've left. Small example - in waiting areas I have decided to implement a badge system - if you wear a green badge it means - come chat to me - so you can make friends with others visiting the clinic - blue badge means i don't want to talk right now - because sometimes symptoms can flare and you just want to be in your own world - same with the group therapy sessions we will be running - these will be a space to either listen to others stories to help you feel less alone - or share your own in a judgement free environment - i truly believe one of the biggest things lacking in health care is community - just being held by a group of people who want the best for you can be one of the most healing elements - meeting others with their own struggles can be a great way to compare what is and what isnt working - can be the birth place of opportunities you never thought possible - and can be the difference between life and death

Also I'm proud to reveal the name - The sanctuary :) 

Watch this space!

Viewed Christmas message from Brighton Beach Busking.

I want to start by saying thank you to everyone who follows this channel, who watches the videos, who comments, shares, supports, and believes in what we do. This channel exists because of you. Walking around Brighton filming music only makes sense because there are people on the other side who care.

Today I want to wish you a beautiful Christmas. And yes, I am saying Christmas.

I know that nowadays many people are afraid of offending someone, so they say “season’s greetings” or “happy holidays.” The other day I was walking in the shopping centre here in Brighton and I noticed something strange: I could not find the word Christmas anywhere. They tried very hard to remove it.

But the truth is simple. You can remove the word from posters, shops, and adverts, but you can never remove Christ from Christmas. The word itself comes from “Christ`s Mass,” the celebration of the birth of Jesus Christ.

I am not here to discuss if Jesus was born exactly on this date or not. What matters is that this is the day the world chose to celebrate His birth.

A humble story. Mary and Joseph travelling for the census. No palace, no comfort, only faith. A manger. A baby born in simplicity. Three kings following a star, travelling from far away, bringing gifts: gold, incense, and myrrh. The first Christmas presents were not about shopping, but about honour, love, and recognition of the Saviour, the Redeemer and King , Jesus Christ.

Christmas is not really about trees, Santa Claus, elves, or endless buying. Those things came later. Christmas is about light entering the world. About hope. About love. About God becoming close to us.

So today, with respect and love, I say: let’s put Christ back into Christmas. Not in a loud or angry way, but in our hearts. In kindness. In humility. In love for one another.

Thank you for walking this journey with Brighton Beach Busking. I wish you peace, faith, and a meaningful Christmas.

Merry Christmas.

Viewed Ren twitter newzroundup from the last few days...

"Coming into week 4 of treatment in Mexico (time is flying) feeling the effects of multiple IVs of strong antibiotics this week (often 8hours in a row) noticing more fatigue, brain fog and mood issues than normal - is all expected as it’s part of the herxheimer reaction. 

Soon will move into the immune building phase where we will be concentrating on things like ivig, stem cells and exosomes along with various peptides which stimulate repair and help dampen auto immune responses

I’d add a sarcastic comment or something but my brain feels like mush so that’s the update"

---

"Being faced with your own mortality on a daily basis is both simultaneously the biggest curse and gift. 
Ridden on so many existential rollercoasters this past decade and a half - spent more days inside a medical facility than out of it this last 3 years - biggest bit of wisdom I’ve taken from it is also the most obvious - don’t take the ability to live in a body free of pain or fatigue for granted - and if you do have to live in pain - it doesn’t have to be your enemy, in some ways it’s been my greatest teacher - also don’t stress the things that don’t matter - you’ll know what matters because whenever you get close the hairs on your body stand up and you’re overcome with a feeling that’s close to euphoria - that’s been my guiding compass pretty much most of my life and it steers me well"

---

"One of the most challenging aspects of the past three years, while undergoing treatment for brain damage and autoimmunity caused by Lyme disease, has been my inability to perform live—whether busking on the streets of Brighton or in a show setting. We tried to compensate for this by throwing ourselves into a special conceptual performance at the Secret Garden Party this summer, aiming to capture, film, and record it all. But, as some of you know, the audio failed during the recording process, which was a devastating setback for everyone involved.
I’ve gotten very used to dusting myself off and getting back up again over the years. So, true to form, we decided to reconceptualize and stage a mini secret show back in Brighton before I headed to Mexico for more stem cell treatment.
 
What we ended up with is something new entirely - I promise you that you wont have seen a filmed live show like it - leant into some really cool ideas during the recording process. 
 
Big thank you to all the incredible fans who got stuck in with this and brought the show to life. People travelled from all over the world to make this what it was - some of you getting flights from as far as Australia after having a weeks notice for a casting call - crazy dedication - but I think its fair to say we made something absolutely incredible!!

Can’t wait for you all to see it.

Join me on Thursday at 7pm UK time on youtube for the premier - for all of those who wanted a live show this will be the closest thing for a while!!

With any luck, and with better health, hopefully the first of many to come

Big love

Sick Boi"

---

Richards Tale and the next installment of vincents tale dropping in the new year <3

Viewed This one was a real labour of love, as some of you will know it wasn't easy creating these as half way through the process I had a huge health crash and had to go to mexico for a stem cell transplant, during one of the shoots for these episodes I had an autoimmune flare that left me temporarily blind in one eye, but with alot of rest and recovery and various treatments I was finally able to come back and finish them and we're finally here!!

Creating these Tales allows me to be creative in ways that merges my favorite parts of film and music and im so excited to share this next installment with you.

This first instalment is a prologue which sets the scene for the first chapter of the story to be told on the 31st of this month - make sure to follow on instagram (@RenMakesMusic) as we will be telling the story through multiple mediums and really pushing the envelope of creativity and the confines of where music can sit. I love bringing these stories and characters to life in the most immersive ways and the tales is such a fun space to do that. For parts of this will be back to the old bardcore style that some of you have come to know me from, and also taking it to some more unusual places too. Really proud of what we made here

For everyone who is new, go check out the Tales of Jenny and screech, and get familiar with the previous story, and also search for 'Screechs tale instagram stories' as well as 'violets tale instagram stories' on youtube to check out the immersive world we built while we were releasing them!

IT FEELS GOOD TO BE BACK BABYYYYY

The first look into this new story is live in 1 hour (8PM BST) LOVE ❤️ 

https://renmakesmusic.lnk.to/SunflowersYT/youtube

Viewed The study of life reveals fractals which echo throughout every system of being.The veins of a leaf and the branches of a river both follow geometric natural optimisation principles - namely the principle of flow efficiency. Incredibly similar branching patterns are found in the human lung, in lightning bolts, in neutrons in the brain - nature has a favourite shape - but not by mistake.

To understand the fractal nature of life exposes clues on how to build the most harmonious systems of living because we have real time macro and micro models of working living systems wherever you look, from the galactic scale down to the subatomic level. 

You can observe what makes these systems thrive, and what causes them to collapse inward—each on a different scale of time relativity.

To understand these governing principles is to uncover an eternal truth:
To be symbiotic is not a question of morality—it is a matter of preservation or self-destruction.

We seem to be the only creature capable of overriding primal instinct—
The only creature with the ability to shape-shift between the parasitic and the symbiotic.

A collective cognitive distress arises when we lean too far into the parasitic—
not because destruction is unnatural, but because imbalance always seeks balance.

Even decay has its place in the symphony or cacophony of life, but when extraction outweighs renewal,  we resist the governing principles woven through nature’s design, and invite nature to correct itself by removing the imbalance forcefully.

To do the opposite and exist within the homeostatic framework laid out for us is to experience a feeling many are unknowingly searching for. Like branches of a river unconsciously searching for the path of least resistance. I truly feel to lean into this and make it part of our behavioural make up would feel like breathing for the first time.

To be symbiotic is to escape a life time of conditioning - and it is to feel a collective relief not yet felt by our species. 

Life is incredible. I wander what it would look like to choose it.

Viewed Had to jump on this 2016 trend but this one actually means something to me.
The first photo is me in 2016 living on Acre Lane in Brixton. I was renting a room in an old man’s house that honestly hadn’t changed since the 60s. There was noo internet, no washing machine, and to get electricity you had to put a pound in the wall (mental). The place was full of religious stuff, Virgin Marys everywhere. Bit creepy at times if I’m honest.. and the old man would walk round the house like that butler on tomb raider 3. I kinda loved the look of the room though but living like that was HEAVY
At that point I was skint & lost tbh.. I was up to NO GOOD man.. running on drink an dr**gs. trying to get by day to day in any way possible (literally), thinking that a record label might save me if I just played along. Looking back, that was the start of realising something wasn’t right.
That photo feels like the end of an era. We had no one coming to our shows, no community around us, and I was doing everything for the wrong reasons. I dont think I knew who I was yet.
The next photo is me now. Again looking into the mirror,, but a completely different person… Soul boy mask on my face, all vanity gone, and weirdly I feel more connected than ever. This thing isn’t about image anymore, it’s about the music, the story and the people around us. The SB Family has changed everything!!
Last slide is us on tour a few weeks ago. Insane man!!! packed rooms every night, with an energy I cant even begin to explain on here!  Something is happening now I couldn’t even imagine back then.
This isn’t a finished story and it’s definitely not a fairytale. We’re still building, still against the odds and still doing it our own way. But if you’re where I was in 2016… lost, ignored, being told to fit a mould, just know you don’t have to. You can be yourself, do weird shit and build it your way!
Thank you for getting me here! 
TO THE NEXT 10 YEARS

Viewed We’re playing Boomtown 2026!
That feels so mad to say!

This band started with nothing. Just songs, and people backing it because they felt something. No plan B, just doing it our own way and seeing where it took us.

Somehow that’s led us here. On a legendary festival, on a lineup full of bands we respect, in a place that welcomes music that doesn’t fit neatly into one box.

We’ve always mixed things up. Never really belonged to one genre. Never wanted to. And it’s mad that instead of being shut out for that, we’re being invited in.

Everyone who’s supported this band in any way, sharing stuff, coming to shows, spreading the word, you’re the reason this keeps happening. This is what it looks like when people decide what matters, not algorithms or gatekeepers.

Boomtown 2026.
Let’s GO!!!!
SB x

Viewed My invention was stolen and is currently being sold on Amazon. HERE'S HOW YOU CAN HELP... (swipe through photos, more details below 👇🏼👇🏼)

Link to the Amazon listing: https://a.co/d/cj0tYpk

Last year, I made a video about inventing the "WheelStand", a wheeled kickstand for the OneWheel. About a week ago, I was surprised to find this product being sold on Amazon. It was surprising because I wasn't selling it, nor had I given permission to anyone to produce and sell it. 

So of course, I had to buy one.

Upon receiving the knockoff WheelStand, it was obvious that it was 3D printed directly from the files I posted online (the files which expressly prohibit commercial use in the license terms). However, it was 3D printed with about 3 wall perimeters and 15% infill, seemingly out of PLA. Unsurprisingly, it immediately snapped upon testing.

There's a bunch of other quality issues with the knockoff (which I'll cover in an upcoming video), and Eden was able to snap the remaining pieces by hand.

Now... I AM aware that by putting this idea into the world (without patenting it), I created the opportunity for someone to steal the idea and pass it off as their own.

However, that doesn't change the fact that stealing ideas without attribution or permission is fundamentally un-cool, and an incredibly low quality version of something that I DESIGNED is something that I DO NOT want to exist out in the world.

So, I would love your help in getting this item removed from Amazon!

Please report the product as counterfeit, leave 1-star reviews... anything you can think of to pressure Amazon and/or the seller to remove the item from Amazon! I'm not super-savvy at this sort of stuff, so comment with your suggestions on additional ways to get this item taken down!

Full video coming soon (of course, I'm making an entirely new solution to the "can't-easily-bring-a-OneWheel-into-a-store" problem) 

Original video: https://youtu.be/RzFl3H5293M?si=RWvvYGos8Lr4_C9s

I also made a follow-up video where I improved the WheelStand, which is HILARIOUS because they chose to knock off the original, worse version 😂: https://youtu.be/caUyK0UiyxI?si=UNy3wN3xzqq_G1OK

Thanks for all of your support and help, this is gonna be a fun video 😁❤️

videos.t: 15 AI Tools That Will Make You $1M (With Zero Employees)
These 6 ChatGPT Hacks Will Make You So Much Money It Feels Illegal

Viewed Most people work hard. Very few win.

Most people don't know about these laws. They just keep adding more meetings, more processes, more hours - thinking effort equals results.

It doesn't.

The carousel above shows you 6 laws that explain why working harder makes things worse.

Why your team's busy but nothing moves.

Why you're exhausted but revenue's the same.

You can't fix what you can't see.

Now you can see it.

Which one hit hardest? Comment the number.

-DM

Viewed Turned 46 today.

I woke up this morning and realized something: I'm twice the age I was when I decided to bet everything on myself.

23 yo Dan was broke, angry, and convinced the world owed him something.

46 yo Dan knows the world doesn't owe you anything. 

But it will give you everything if you're willing to work for it and give it away when you get it.

Here's what's shifted for me this year:

I used to measure success by what I built. Now I measure it by who I helped build.

I used to think freedom meant not having to work. Now I know freedom is loving the work so much you'd do it for free.

I used to believe I needed to have all the answers. Now I know the best thing I can do is ask better questions.

The truth is, I'm not done. Not even close.

There's more to build. More people to help. More impact to make.

And the best part is I finally feel like I know what I'm building toward.

Not another exit. Not another company. Not another milestone.

But a legacy. Something that outlasts me. Something that matters beyond the money. A movement.

To everyone who's been part of this journey - THANK YOU 🩵

Here's to another year of building what matters.

-DM

Viewed Just turned 46 last week.

Been reflecting on what I've learned at each stage of my life. The advice I ignored. The lessons I learned too late. The things I wish someone had told me earlier.

So here's what I'd tell my younger self at each decade. And what I'm still learning now.

Every stage teaches you something different. Your 20s teach you to work. Your 30s teach you to choose. Your 40s teach you what (I think) matters.

Read the advice for your age first. Then read the rest. Sometimes the lesson you need is waiting one decade ahead.

Drop a comment and let me know which one hit hardest for you.

-DM

Thank you pretty muchly, yum yum. 
🙏

Viewed Dude, I love your videos, honest to god. I actually use them instead of googling sometimes, because I tend to work fullstack and sometimes I'll be switching between mindsets over and over again in a day's span; going to your videos bridges the need for entertainment and also human sympathy. Having that said, one thing that I would really like to hear your take on is just precisely ¨the state of programming¨ or something like that. Not really as like ¨here's the absolute best way to do this¨, but I feel like a lot, a lot and a lot of people would benefit from having certain temporal markers to get a hold of how the landscape is shifting. Like, for example, when docker came out, I have been using it a lot and while it doesnt substitute you know, cloud vmware that you can hire, me and buddies tend to use it that way. 
Which is kinda why I'm typing this, I noticed that we may sometimes be dislodged regarding which things we are using, so a unifying type of video that comes out with certain frequency idk, I think it would be awesome to hear you talk about like the general panorama, and hear your takes because I respect you as an authority in IT tbh. But anyway, I rambled, thanks a lot for everything you do mate! Hope you are having a wonderful beggining of the year.
